title: CMPD Officer Arrested for DWI in Stanly County
summary: CMPD officer Dylan Auch arrested in Locust for DWI and expired vehicle registration.
charlotte_impact: Highlights accountability within law enforcement and potential public safety concerns.

title: Arson Threat at Burke County Business Leads to Arrest
summary: Suspect threatened to burn down a Burke County business after pouring gasoline.
charlotte_impact: Arson poses a significant threat to property and safety, requiring immediate law enforcement action.

title: Church Treasurer Accused of $80,000 Embezzlement
summary: Hope Corley accused of stealing $80,000 from a Lincoln County Baptist church between June 2025 and February 2026.
charlotte_impact: Financial crimes within religious organizations erode trust and impact community resources.

title: Abandoned Puppies Reunited with Mother; Charges Pending
summary: Eight puppies abandoned in Gaston County reunited with their mother; suspect faces charges.
charlotte_impact: Animal cruelty cases raise ethical concerns and prompt legal action to protect vulnerable animals.

title: Suspect Surrenders in Crowded Parking Lot Shooting
summary: Ahmad Rashad Leggett Jr. surrenders on attempted murder charges after shooting in a crowded gas station parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Gun violence in public spaces endangers lives and necessitates swift law enforcement response.

title: Blue Line Single-Tracking Through May 8 for Construction
summary: CATS to single-track Blue Line through May 8 for South End Station construction, causing service disruptions.
charlotte_impact: Infrastructure projects impact public transportation and require riders to adjust their commutes.

title: Kannapolis Man Charged with Murder in Deadly Assault
summary: Brian Menzies charged with murder in connection to the death of Daliely Amparo on April 5.
charlotte_impact: Murder cases have severe legal and social consequences, impacting families and communities.

title: Man Charged with 'Weapon of Mass Destruction' Possession
summary: Man charged after a Claremont home explosion on April 1 injured two people.
charlotte_impact: Possession of dangerous devices poses a significant threat to public safety and requires thorough investigation.

title: CMPD Offers Pet Adoption Tryouts
summary: CMPD Animal Care & Control offers trial periods for pet adoptions, up to 10 days.
charlotte_impact: Promotes responsible pet ownership and helps animals find suitable homes.

title: Emergency Crews Respond to Gas Leak in East Charlotte
summary: Piedmont Natural Gas is working to repair a gas leak on Brawley Lane in east Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Gas leaks pose safety hazards and require immediate attention to prevent accidents.

title: Patchy Frost Followed by Warmup; 80s Return
summary: Light frost expected Thursday morning, followed by a warmup with temperatures reaching the mid-80s this weekend.
charlotte_impact: Weather patterns affect daily life and agricultural activities.

title: Aging Population Shrinks US Workforce Participation
summary: Fewer workers could slow economic growth, even with job growth and declining unemployment.
charlotte_impact: Demographic shifts impact the economy and require policy adjustments.

title: Mooresville Mayor Refuses to Resign After No Confidence Vote
summary: Mayor Chris Carney says he will not step down despite pressure from town commissioners.
charlotte_impact: Political conflicts can affect local governance and community relations.

title: Suspect Incompetent for Trial in Zarutska Murder Case
summary: Decarlos Brown, accused of fatally stabbing Iryna Zarutska, deemed incompetent to stand trial.
charlotte_impact: Mental competency affects legal proceedings and justice for victims.

title: Zakk Wylde Set for Charlotte Show
summary: Black Label Society, Zakk Sabbath, and Dark Chapel perform at The Fillmore on Friday, April 10.
charlotte_impact: Cultural events contribute to community engagement and entertainment.
